task.domains: (topic task) (topic hi-d) (topic ui-d) (topic sw-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic ut-d) a(base ishcondition) a(base varid) a(base varref) a(base cid) a(base partslist) (topic oce-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceMetaDecl-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c)
task.title: 01-T-001 Replacement lubricators

abstract.p: You received this trigger on your work list because the curing lubricators need to be replaced (regular maintenance action).

note.p: No extra visit is required for this action. It should be combined with a regular service visit.

prereq.p: No specific preparation required, only order the correct lubricators prior to the visit.

section.title: Background information
section.p: To prevent service calls and replacement of the runner block it is essential that the lubricators are replaced on time.

Replacement of the lubricators will preferable done by the customer when indicated on the operator panel. If a customer is not capable to replace the lubricators the technician can perform this task during a regular service visit. To facilitate this the technician will receive this trigger before the indication on the operator panel becomes active. If the customer replaces the lubricators (preferred) then the technician can ignore this trigger.
